mapper.select: insert into deep_research_runs ( query_id, question, route_reason, plan_json, layer_count, task_count, llm_call_count, citation_coverage, partial_answer, has_conflicts, final_answer_audit_id ) values ( #{record.queryId}, #{record.question}, #{record.routeReason}, #{record.planJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.layerCount}, #{record.taskCount}, #{record.llmCallCount}, #{record.citationCoverage}, #{record.partialAnswer}, #{record.hasConflicts}, #{record.finalAnswerAuditId} ) returning run_id
